steps.title: Find the missing verb
steps.content: The subject is the plural noun phrase "Puerto Rico's museums." The sentence needs a finite main verb that agrees with that plural subject.

steps.title: Rule out nonfinite forms
steps.content: A is an infinitive, B is a participle phrase, and D is a present participle; none can serve as the main verb by itself. The base present-tense verb agrees with plural "museums" and completes the sentence. The answer is C.
